description: Bitgo Holdings, Inc. operates as a digital asset infrastructure company in the United States and internationally. The company offers self-custody wallet, qualified custody, liquidity and prime, and infrastructure-as-a-service to investors, builders, and other participants in the digital asset ecosystem. Its clients range from crypto-native companies that use its self-custody wallet technology to financial services firms, digital asset ecosystem companies, technology platforms, corporations, and government agencies, as well as high net worth individuals. The company's principal markets include
